concept: I'd fancy an action game where I control a character who can temporarily swap physical locations with both living beings and inanimate objects within line of sight. Switching with enemies places them in danger while giving me their advantageous position, switching with moving objects allows rapid traversal, and switching with projectiles enables unique attack patterns. Each swap drains energy that regenerates slowly, requiring careful management of this limited resource. The story explores ethical questions about what happens to consciousness during these exchanges and whether something of each entity remains changed afterward.
